title: mentha theresitae
intro: Mentha theresitae, also known as South African pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to act as a natural antispasmodic, carminative, and digestive aid. The plant's health benefits include alleviating menstrual cramps, nausea, and indigestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory issues. Mentha theresitae can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, often combined with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
